## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation

### Testing
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Backend linting passes (`black --check .` and `flake8`)
- [ ] Frontend linting passes (`npm run lint`)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation in `/docs`
- [ ] I have updated API documentation if endpoints changed

### Dependencies
- [ ] I have updated `pyproject.toml` if Python dependencies changed
- [ ] I have updated `package.json` if Node dependencies changed
- [ ] I have run `pip install -e ".[dev]"` (backend) or `npm install` (frontend)
